title: Halal Food & Culture Walking Tour in Hamburg
shortDescription: A food-conscious city walk combining neighborhood stories, halal-friendly recommendations, and the cultural side of everyday Hamburg.
fullDescription: This tour is for travellers who want local flavor without the guesswork. The route mixes urban context, cultural interpretation, and carefully framed halal-conscious recommendations. It is especially good for guests who want to orient themselves around Muslim-friendly food options while still enjoying a proper walking tour.
heroImageAlt: Illustration for a halal food and culture walking tour in Hamburg
muslimFriendlyFeatures: Awareness of prayer timing and nearby suitable stops
Comfortable pacing for guests travelling with children
excluded: Meals and tastings unless later added
audience: Guests wanting a practical first-day orientation
availabilityNote: Recommended for guests staying at least two days in Hamburg.

faq.question: Are meals included in this version?
faq.answer: Not yet. The current MVP includes the route and recommendation experience, with placeholder space to add tastings later.
